title: SlimeCave
description: SlimeCave is a unique vanilla-focused modpack where players dig for resources in a stone-filled world, featuring quests by Heracles and regular updates that may require fresh starts. 🪨✨
body:
# SlimeCave 🪨✨

Welcome to **SlimeCave**, a modpack like no other! Or is it?

You might think you know what’s coming, but think again. Dive into a world filled with stone. Yes, it sounds like Stoneblock, but there’s so much more in store!

You won’t have any mods to help you gather resources initially—you’ll need to dig deep. This modpack aims to keep things very vanilla, with a few mods sprinkled in but no major tech mods. Ores and structures do generate in the world, adding a touch of adventure.

Quests, created by [Heracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/heracles), can be accessed by pressing `U` by default.

You'll start with a custom wooden pickaxe and maybe... find a treasure nearby? Create your own team using `/skyblock gui` or by pressing `L` (default).

Dive into a world full of stone and adventure! 🏔️🪓

## Credits 🙏

- The mod `Inventory Sorter` in `overrides/mods/` is created by `cpw` and available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-sorter). It’s under the GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE v3. 
- The mod `Twerk It Meal` in `data/common/mods` is made by `TicTicBoooom` and can be found on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twerkitmeal). It’s under the MIT License. 
- The mod `Placebo` in `data/client/mods` is by `Shadows_of_Fire` and is on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/placebo). It’s under the MIT License.
